creator: schwer_q.lists@outlook.com
text: Hi, I had this issue a long time ago (it was in 2013 on 9.x, I think) but I never solved it. I think you can enforce nvidia's libGL to link with libthr.so by adding "LDFLAGS+= -pthread" in the x11/nvidia-driver's Makefile. I can make a patch if you need but I cannot test since I am not running FreeBSD with NVidia's graphic card anymore...
